title: Don't Build Your Own AI Inference! It's Too Expensive & Risky! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that building independent AI inference infrastructure is prohibitively expensive and risky due to technical complexity and potential pivots. He recommends relying on established vendors instead.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes the case against building independent AI inference infrastructure, arguing the cost and risk outweigh the benefits. The reasoning rests on technical complexity and the chance of later pivots that strand the investment. The recommendation is to rely on established vendors rather than running inference in house.
